name: Review session shows confidence rating before answer reveal
description: When reviewing a card, the user must first rate their confidence (1-5) before the Reveal Answer button appears. This tests the JOL confidence gate.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the login page and log in with valid credentials
Navigate to the Review Cards page from the sidebar
Verify a card question is displayed with text asking 'Before revealing — how confident are you?' and five numbered confidence buttons (1 through 5) are visible
Verify a confidence badge showing filled dots appears and a 'Reveal Answer' button becomes visible below it
